title: neottianthe cucullata
intro: Neottianthe cucullata, also known as the hooded orchid or hooded lip orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to mountainous regions of East Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Neottianthe cucullata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent due to its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Neottianthe cucullata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce fever.
